_session_note: Omnivore now working end-to-end. Dispatch bug fixed via two-pass + simultaneous-commit split resolution. Minerals reworked to limit producers (need scales with pop). Cap-based omnivore food formula. P+H+O confirmed stable. trampling currently 0 in sim.toml — minerals carry producer-limit load. Outstanding: omnivore entry-window tests, P+O boom-bust retest, four-way P+H+C+O, trampling revival at low value.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.status: active — ecosystem_core running. sim_test ported. Carnivore AND omnivore both confirmed as stabilizers. Game crate not yet ported.
overview.workspace: ~/ecosystem/ — workspace root with members: core, game, sim_test, salsa_proto
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs / Termux filesystem, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: DEPRECATED — monolithic fitness resolution replaced by ecosystem_core. Still present in game crate, not yet removed.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

ecosystem_core.role: Standalone crate owning all fitness computation via salsa 0.26. sim_test depends on it. Game crate not yet ported.
ecosystem_core.pattern: OrganismInputs and BiomeInputs as salsa input structs. Trait modifiers are leaf fields with defaults. Fitness queries are tracked functions. Adding a trait = setting a leaf field.
ecosystem_core.db_pattern: Db trait (#[salsa::db]) + EcosystemDb concrete struct. fitness_for takes &dyn Db (pure compute, no mutation). best_omnivore_split takes &mut dyn Db (searches splits, restores state without committing).
ecosystem_core.last_population: OrganismInputs has last_population field. Set at start of each turn before fitness queries. food_pool uses last_population (Option B timing).
ecosystem_core.omnivore_carnivore_fraction: OrganismInputs field (f32, default 0.5 baseline). Resolved each turn via simultaneous-commit (see omnivore_system).

api_notes.db_trait: #[salsa::db] on both trait and impl. Concrete db takes salsa::Storage<Self>.
api_notes.tracked_functions: First arg must be &dyn Db not &ConcreteDb.
api_notes.setter: use ecosystem_core::Setter (re-exported) to call .to() on setters.
api_notes.update_derive: unsafe impl salsa::Update for Role — manual impl required in 0.26.

sim_harness.location: sim_test/ — standalone Rust binary, runs on Termux
sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile
sim_harness.status: PORTED TO ecosystem_core. biome.rs and types.rs still present as dead files.
sim_harness.food_pool_timing: Option B active — last_population snapshot at turn start. food_pool = sum(last_pop * food_output_multiplier). No fitness scaling.
sim_harness.population_thresholds: Applied in sim_test/src/main.rs after fitness queries. Role-grouped; omnivore grouped by c (>0.5 carnivore group, else herbivore group).
sim_harness.turn_structure: 1) snapshot last_population. 2) PASS 1: resolve omnivore splits via best_omnivore_split against shared baseline, commit simultaneously. 3) PASS 2: compute all fitnesses. 4) apply population thresholds. 5) update land organism list.

share_formula.water: water_share = (org_pop / total_animal_pop) * water * water_multiplier. Need only determines sufficiency via resource_factor.
share_formula.herbivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_herb_omni_pop) * food_pool. Omnivore participates at (1-c).
share_formula.carnivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_carn_pop) * prey_value. Omnivore participates at c.
share_formula.rationale: Pop-based not need-based. Population IS biomass. Size is individual-only, used for eligibility gates not quantity.

components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0

fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED → returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5
fitness_system.combine_factors: Single helper in math.rs takes &[factors]. Thresholds read from constants, not passed as args.

resources.sunlight: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0). Shading: largest producers shade smaller; available -= territory*pop*SHADE_K per tier.
resources.minerals: resource_factor(mineral_share, mineral_need * pop). mineral_share = (reach*pop / total_reach) * minerals. NEED NOW SCALES WITH POP — this makes minerals a per-capita producer self-limit even for a single species. Key change this session.
resources.water: Pop-based share. resource_factor(share, water_need * pop). No need-weighting in share.
resources.food_herbivore: Pop-based share of food_pool. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).
resources.food_carnivore: Pop-based share of prey_value. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).
resources.territory: All roles now route through tolerance_factor(total_territory, 0.0, space) — unified from old hand-rolled sqrt penalty. Capped at 1.0 below capacity, sqrt falloff above. Single producer never hits cap at POP_MAX=6 with space 8; multi-species needed to engage.

pressure_system.food_pressure: (grazer_pressure / prod_pop) * PRESSURE_K1. grazer_pressure = sum over herb/omni of pop*weight (weight=1 herbivore, (1-c) omnivore). Applied to producer fitness.
pressure_system.trampling: sum(max(0, consumer_size - prod_size) * territory * pop) * coverage * PRESSURE_K2. coverage = prod_pop/(prod_pop+1) — Michaelis-Menten saturation, eases early growth, saturates ~0.9 at pop 9. Omnivore trampling NOT weighted by c — full population always (intended: physical presence tramples regardless of diet).
pressure_system.trampling_status: PRESSURE_K2 currently set to 0 in sim.toml. Minerals now carry the producer-limit / collapse load. Trampling to be revived at LOW value to add size-asymmetry flavor (large herbivore vs small producer) without being the collapse driver.
pressure_system.trampling_size_role: Size in trampling is legitimate — it is a size-asymmetry physical interaction (big animal steps on small plant), distinct from biomass. This is why trampling is worth keeping alongside minerals — different axis.

predation_system.hunt_limit: size * hunt_multiplier + hunt_size_bonus. hunt_multiplier always 1.0 base (vestigial, remove from config). At size 1.7 omnivore hunts prey <1.7 (catches herbivore 1.5, not carnivore 2.0).
predation_system.prey_value: sum over eligible prey of (pop * nutrition). NO SIZE — population is biomass. Nutrition: HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR for herbivore/omnivore prey, CARNIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR for carnivore prey. Used for FEEDING only.
predation_system.prey_biomass: sum over eligible prey of (pop). No nutrition. Was added for predation decoupling but predation_factor now computes predator_pressure inline — prey_biomass is effectively dead code, remove later.
predation_system.predation_factor: PER-PREY now — takes the specific prey organism. predator_pressure = sum over hunters that can hunt THIS prey of (pop * weight); weight=1 carnivore, c omnivore. factor = 1/(1 + predator_pressure/prey_pop * PREDATION_K). NO nutrition, NO food_need — decoupled this session. A prey no predator can hunt feels zero pressure.
predation_system.decoupling_rationale: Nutrition in predation made it functionally food_need-in-disguise. Removed so nutrition only affects carnivore feeding, independent lever from predation pressure.

omnivore_system.split_options: OMNI_SPLITS = [0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0] — carnivore fraction c. 1.0 INCLUDED (omnivore can fully commit to hunting; earlier exclusion was wrong and capped it at 0.75).
omnivore_system.resolution: Simultaneous-move. All omnivores sit at current committed fraction (0.5 turn-1 baseline). best_omnivore_split finds each one's best c against that SHARED state WITHOUT committing (restores after search). All decisions collected, then committed together. Order-independent, deterministic. Multi-omnivore converges over turns rather than solving joint optimum instantly.
omnivore_system.food_formula: Per side: proportional = (pool / total_pool_pop) * (pop * commitment); cap = pool * commitment; intake = min(proportional, cap). prey side: pool=prey_value, commitment=c, total_pool_pop=total_carn_pop. plant side: pool=food_pool, commitment=(1-c), total_pool_pop=total_herb_omni_pop. total_food = prey_food + plant_food, vs resource_factor(total, food_need*pop).
omnivore_system.cap_rationale: Earlier bug: proportional share alone let a LONE omnivore at c=0.5 sweep the entire prey pool because c cancelled (c in numerator, c*pop in denominator). The min-with-cap (pool*commitment) ensures a half-committed sole hunter takes at most half the pool. Competition (proportional) binds when contested; commitment (cap) binds when uncontested.
omnivore_system.aggregate_participation: total_herb_omni_pop counts omnivore at (1-c). total_carn_pop counts omnivore at c. predation predator_pressure and grazer food_pressure weight omnivore fractionally. Trampling does NOT (full pop).
omnivore_system.grouping_for_thresholds: In main.rs population thresholds: omnivore joins carnivore group when c>0.5, else herbivore group. NOT its own group.
omnivore_system.as_prey: Omnivore is prey for carnivores at HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR regardless of current split.

confirmed.PRESSURE_K2: 0.06 in math.rs but set 0 in sim.toml during mineral tuning

constants.tuning_note: Values shifted from prior session during mineral overhaul. PREDATION_K up to 0.3, nutrition factors raised (herbivore 1.0, carnivore 0.95) to soften carnivore fitness cliff at hunter:prey parity. Producer mineral_need lowered to ~1.0 so mineral pinch bites at higher producer pop. These are mid-tuning — re-confirm before locking.
constants.threshold_note: Stability window DOWNGRADE_IF_WORST=0.85 / UPGRADE_IF_BEST=0.9. Narrow gap prevents oscillation trap.

producer.mineral_need: ~1.0 (lowered from 1.5 this session so minerals bite at higher pop)

omnivore.note: hunt_multiplier vestigial — remove from config, hardcode 1.0.

carnivore.water_need: 1.1 (good carnivore run was food 1.0 / water 1.1, NOT old 1.3/2.1)

without_predator.1_1: Collapse confirmed (mineral + grazing pressure, trampling 0). Boom to ~P3/H5 then crash.
without_predator.design_goal: No stable P+H — collapse is default. Predator (carnivore or omnivore) required for stability.

with_carnivore.2_2_1: Stable P6/H4/C3 — near-parity carn:herb. Confirmed with mineral-limit model, trampling 0, PREDATION_K 0.3, nutrition 1.0.
with_carnivore.entry_window: With mineral model the window SHIFTED: 1/1/1 works, 3/3/1 too late (producer already mineral-stressed by then). Opposite of old trampling-era window. Accepted — turn-1 full-web establishment matches card economy (full opening hand) and is ecologically sensible.
with_carnivore.carnivore_role: Keeps herbivore in check so producer survives mineral pressure.

with_omnivore.p_h_o_1_1_1: Stable through 20 turns. Settles ~turn 8 into 2-turn cycle: P6 locked, H 3<->4, O 2<->3. Omnivore alternates c=1.0 (when H=4) and c=0.75 (when H=3) — tracks prey availability like real predator-prey. Near-parity O:H.
with_omnivore.split_behavior: Omnivore picks high c (1.0/0.75) when prey abundant, drops toward 0.5 when herbivore scarce. Adaptive splitting working as designed.
with_omnivore.outstanding: P+O without herbivore (boom-bust retest), entry window (only 1/1/1 confirmed), four-way P+H+C+O.

session_milestones_2026-06-08: Fixed omnivore dispatch — was routing to herbivore_fitness, now omnivore_fitness_at via fitness_for.
Fixed evaluation-order bug — producer saw stale omnivore c. Two-pass: resolve splits first, then compute fitnesses.
Replaced single-pass split with simultaneous-commit (best_omnivore_split + collect + commit together). Order-independent for multi-omnivore.
Reworked minerals: need scales with pop → producer self-limits even as single species. Now carries collapse load.
Decoupled predation from nutrition — predation_factor now per-prey, population-only, no food_need.
Removed size from prey_value — population is biomass.
Cap-based omnivore food formula — min(proportional_share, pool*commitment) fixes lone-hunter sweeping whole pool.

card_ideas_noted.camouflage_trait: PredationResistance scaling with population density — sparsity-style.

2026-05-26.decision: Adopt salsa 0.26 as incremental computation backend
2026-05-26.rationale: Dirty-flagging isolates per-organism subgraphs; trait modifiers as input leaves need no formula changes

2026-06-08.decision: Minerals limit producers via pop-scaled need
2026-06-08.rationale: Gives producer an intrinsic per-capita cap independent of trampling; shares collapse load so trampling need not be extreme

2026-06-08.decision: Predation decoupled from nutrition; per-prey factor
2026-06-08.rationale: Nutrition-in-predation was food_need in disguise; per-prey lets unhuntable prey feel zero pressure

2026-06-08.decision: Population is biomass; size is eligibility-only (except trampling size-asymmetry)
2026-06-08.rationale: Size removed from prey_value; kept in trampling as genuine size-asymmetry interaction
Lone hunter at c<1 was sweeping whole pool (c cancelled in share); cap throttles intake by commitment when uncontested
Sequential resolution was order-dependent and producer saw stale c; simultaneous commit from shared baseline is deterministic
Omnivore must be able to fully commit to hunting when optimal; prior exclusion capped it at 0.75

implementation.attempted: ecosystem_core build + sim_test port + tuning + omnivore split
implementation.outcome: Built and running. Omnivore dispatch bug found.

implementation.attempted: Omnivore dispatch fix, mineral overhaul, predation decoupling, cap-based omnivore food, simultaneous-commit resolution
implementation.outcome: P+H+O confirmed stable through 20 turns with adaptive splitting and near-parity O:H. Carnivore still stable P6/H4/C3. Minerals carry producer-limit; trampling at 0 pending low-value revival.
implementation.decided: Next: omnivore entry-window + P+O boom-bust + four-way tests, then revive trampling low, then port game crate.

next_session_tasks: Test P+O without herbivore — confirm boom-bust collapse (omnivore can't sustain on plants alone)
Test omnivore entry window — does P+H+O stabilize from 2/2/1, 3/3/1, 4/4/1 or only 1/1/1
Test four-way P+H+C+O — does it hold with both predators present
Revive trampling at low PRESSURE_K2 — size-asymmetry flavor, not collapse driver
Re-confirm constants after mineral overhaul (PREDATION_K 0.3, nutrition 1.0/0.95, producer mineral_need ~1.0)
Remove hunt_multiplier from sim.toml and OrgConfig — hardcode 1.0
Remove dead prey_biomass function from queries.rs
Port game crate (game.rs, ai.rs, ui.rs) to v4 types and ecosystem_core
Remove dead biome.rs and types.rs from sim_test
